title: Extension of the last date to receive comments/ counter-comments on the TRAI's consultation paper on the Framework for Satellite Communication Network Authorisation, and Assignment of Spectrum to Satellite Communication Network Providers.
description: Extension of the last date to receive comments/ counter-comments on the TRAI's consultation paper on the Framework for Satellite Communication Network Authorisation, and Assignment of Spectrum to Satellite Communication Network Providers. nitinkumar Wed, 05/06/2026 - 11:17 File Press Release No. 59 (468.07 KB) Date Wed, 05/06/2026 - 12:00
